assertions.description: INCORRECT: C10 has value '2.2' (aluminum electrolytic, CP_Radial_D5.0mm footprint — clearly 2.2uF). The inrush_analysis section treats this as 2.2 Farads, giving total_output_capacitance_uF: 2200000.0 and estimated_inrush_A: 22000.0. These values are physically impossible for a small THT electrolytic capacitor. The correct capacitance is 2.2 uF.

INCORRECT: Capacitors C9 and C10 have value '2.2' and C8 has value '220'. These are aluminum electrolytic capacitors (CP_Radial footprints) and the bare numeric convention for this component class is microfarads (2.2uF and 220uF). In signal_analysis.decoupling_analysis the farads values are 2.2e-12 and 2.2e-10 (picofarad range — wrong), causing total_capacitance_uF: 0.0 for +12V and +5V rails. In pdn_impedance the same caps are parsed as 2.2F and 220F (Farad range — also wrong). Neither interpretation is correct.

INCORRECT: U2 (L7805) is a classic fixed positive linear voltage regulator from the 78xx series. It is NOT an LDO — it requires a dropout voltage of ~2V. The signal_analysis.power_regulators entry reports topology: 'LDO', which is incorrect. The correct classification is 'linear' or 'fixed_linear'. This also propagates to power_budget and inrush_analysis which also show topology: 'LDO'.
